decision-tree.root-question: Decision record present AND dataset ≥ 1000 examples AND eval baseline known AND owner named?

branch.when: decision_record == null OR dataset_size < 1000 OR baseline_score == null OR owner == null
decision_record != null AND dataset_size >= 1000 AND baseline_score != null AND owner != null
branch.question: Hold-out 10%+ disjoint+stratified AND PII audit pass AND rollback tested?

branch.when: holdout_ok == true AND pii_pass == true AND rollback_dry_run_passed == true
holdout_ok == false OR pii_pass == false OR rollback_dry_run_passed == false

example.trace: decision rec present, 6500 examples, baseline 0.78, owner ml-eng, holdout 10% disjoint, PII pass, rollback dry-run pass -> run-the-checklist
